name: skin-aqua
title: Mac OS X Aqua skin
description: Mac OS X Aqua concept skin: glossy gel lozenges, pinstripes, candy-blue gradients. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="aqua"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/aqua.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="aqua" on <html>.
